stack: Hono + Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2 — NO Supabase — Pure Edge
backend_completed: ✅ Hono 4.x app on Cloudflare Workers (src/index.tsx)
✅ JWT Auth — register, login, /me, profile update (src/routes/auth.ts)
✅ Hotel Search — Travelpayouts API + D1 cache (1hr TTL) (src/routes/search.ts)
✅ Price Comparison — Travelpayouts + Booking.com + Expedia + Hotels.com (src/routes/prices.ts)
✅ AI Chat JSON — LaoZhang/KIE.ai intent extraction + hotel recommendations (src/routes/chat.ts)
✅ AI Chat SSE STREAM — token-by-token for AIChatPanel.tsx (POST /api/chat/stream)
✅ Voice Chat — transcript → hotel search → ElevenLabs TTS → R2 audio (src/routes/chat.ts)
✅ Favorites — save/list/remove/check (src/routes/favorites.ts)
✅ Price Alerts — create/list/delete/pause + Resend email (src/routes/alerts.ts)
✅ Hourly CRON — Cloudflare Cron Trigger checks all active price alerts
✅ Bookings — click tracking + CSV expense export (src/routes/bookings.ts)
✅ Stripe Webhook — subscription tier sync (src/routes/webhooks.ts)
✅ Whop Webhook — membership granted/expired sync (src/routes/webhooks.ts)
✅ Admin Dashboard — commission stats + monthly breakdown (src/routes/admin.ts)
✅ Agency Commission Report — full revenue report + user list (src/routes/admin.ts)
✅ D1 Database — 9 tables, fully indexed schema (migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql)
✅ R2 Storage — voice audio files keyed by user/message ID
✅ Tier gating middleware — free/traveler/business/agency (src/middleware/auth.ts)
✅ CORS — accepts Lovable preview domains + *.pages.dev + production custom domain
✅ Rate limiting — 5 searches/day for free tier with daily reset
✅ IP-based Locale Detection — GET /api/locale using CF-IPCountry header, zero cost
✅ 13 Language Support — country→language mapping for EN/ES/FR/DE/PT/JA/ZH/AR + more
✅ Currency Detection — country→ISO 4217 currency for 40+ countries
✅ White-label Config — GET /api/config returns branding + feature flags from env vars
✅ Trending Hotels — GET /api/hotels/trending for homepage hero (rating-weighted sort)
✅ Driver Mode Hotels — GET /api/hotels/driver-mode (parking, budget, highway access)
✅ Geo-nearby Hotels — GET /api/hotels/nearby (lat/lon bounding box + haversine)
✅ Map Markers — GET /api/hotels/map-markers (lightweight, Leaflet-optimised payload)
✅ .env.example — all 25+ env vars documented with descriptions
✅ One-command setup — full deploy script in README

api_endpoints.config: GET  /api/config   ← Lovable App.tsx calls on startup for branding + feature flags
api_endpoints.locale: GET  /api/locale   ← i18n.ts calls for IP-based language + currency
chat: POST /api/chat/voice    ← voice transcript → ElevenLabs TTS audio

lovable_integration.startup_call: App.tsx → GET /api/config → sets site_name, colors, feature flags
lovable_integration.i18n_call: i18n.ts → GET /api/locale → sets language, currency, rtl, show_driver_features

events.token: { type: 'token', token: string }  ← append to chat bubble

locale_detection.mechanism: Cloudflare CF-IPCountry header — zero cost, no external API

d1_schema_tables: users — id, email, name, password_hash, subscription_tier, stripe_customer_id, whop_user_id, preferred_language, preferred_currency, search_count_today, search_count_reset_at

hotel_cache — id, travelpayouts_id, name, location, city, country, stars, rating, price, currency, image_url, amenities (JSON), lat, lon, affiliate_link, has_parking, has_truck_parking, highway_access, is_family_friendly, cached_at, expires_at
price_alerts — id, user_id, hotel_id, hotel_name, target_price, current_price, currency, check_in, check_out, status (active|triggered|expired|paused)
bookings — id, user_id, hotel_id, hotel_name, check_in, check_out, guests, rooms, total_price, currency, commission_earned, status, affiliate_link
chat_threads — id, user_id, title, message_count, last_message_at
chat_messages — id, thread_id, user_id, role (user|assistant|system), content, hotel_ids (JSON), intent, language
voice_messages — id, user_id, thread_id, transcript, response_text, audio_url, hotels_recommended (JSON), language
whop_subscriptions — id, user_id, whop_user_id, membership_id, plan_id, tier (traveler|business|agency), status, started_at, expires_at
one_command_setup: # Edit .dev.vars — fill in your API keys
npx wrangler r2 bucket create travel-payout-media
production_deploy: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply travel-payout-production
npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name travel-payout-hotels
npx wrangler pages secret put TRAVELPAYOUTS_API_KEY --project-name travel-payout-hotels
npx wrangler pages secret put JWT_SECRET --project-name travel-payout-hotels

selling_points: Fully functional hotel search SaaS with affiliate revenue built-in
Travelpayouts credentials included (marker 314682) — start earning day 1
Pure Cloudflare edge stack — ~$5/mo hosting at scale
White-label ready — change brand in env vars only, no code changes
Price comparison across 4 providers (Travelpayouts, Booking, Expedia, Hotels.com)
Driver Mode — unique niche feature for delivery/truck drivers
Stripe + Whop subscription billing wired and working
D1 SQLite + R2 storage — no external database cost
Cron-based price alerts with Resend email delivery
One-command setup — buyer can be live in under 30 minutes
